_meta.purpose: Stage 1 — per-entity inventory + coverage scoring (decisions #21/#22). Sources from the Entity Store v2 backing alias 'entities-latest-default' (one doc per canonical host entity). Uses a latest transform (unique_key: entity.id) to pass each entity doc through the m_26_14-score-entity-pipeline dest pipeline, which: (1) enriches m_26_14-inventory by host.name to establish canonical status (asset.id present = inventory-sourced); (2) enriches m_26_14-observed by host.name for last_log/first_log/datasets; (3) enriches config thresholds; (4) computes score_inventory (0/1 freshness within 7d), score_coverage (0/1 has datasets), effective_horizon_days (empirical retention from first_log), provenance, is_canonical, and quadrant. Produces element:'asset' docs in m_26_14-scores with _id='asset::<effective_asset_id>'. Space: default (hardcoded; make a Fleet policy var at M8). Phase 1 NOTE: IP-fold (folding observed-<ip>@collector into canonical entities) is deferred -- entities only visible via IP-keyed observed entries appear as expected_silent. See m_26_14-score-entity-pipeline _meta for details. Run AFTER enrich policies are executed and m_26_14-observed has data.
_meta.dependency_order: 3 of 5 scoring transforms (after Stage 0; run enrich _execute first)
_meta.on_cluster_validation: Confirm entities-latest-default alias is accessible by the transform service principal (system index access). If not, use .entities.v2.latest.security_default directly.
